occupation: International Strategic Sales and Marketing Director at Executive Channel Network (ECN)
headline: International Strategic Sales and Marketing Director at Executive Channel Network (ECN)
summary:
Advertising media and marketing professional with experience in all facets of the media industry. Have worked for advertising agencies, media agencies and media owners. Am passionate about out of home advertising and how the digital era will transform the industry.

Specialties: Core competencies include B2B marketing strategy , direct marketing, strategic communications planning, communications implementation planning & buying across all channels.

experiences.title: International Strategic Sales and Marketing Director
experiences.description: Responsible for driving global revenue by successfully communicating our brand story.

experiences.title: Strategic sales & marketing director
experiences.description: Responsible for driving national revenue by successfully communicating our brand story.

experiences.title: Marketing Manager
experiences.description: Responsible for brand identification, positioning, employee engagement strategy Development of insight program (Executive Lives) Sales strategic support Audience metrics

experiences.title: GM Marketing
experiences.description: Responsible for driving all marketing and brand strategy across Australia and NZ. Key responsibilities include brand, insight, audience measurement, trade advertising, sponsorship and client strategy.

experiences.title: Strategy Director
experiences.description: Responsible for driving the overall strategy communication process within the organisation, client communication strategy,  new business strategy and presentation, training and learning and corporate communications.

recommendations:
Liz Farquharson

Paul is an innovative, insights led, marketer with deep knowledge of the media and communication industry. He is a rare breed - a client thats full of ideas, highly collaborative and a joy to work with each and every time.

Angus Frazer

Without any reservation, I would recommend Paul from both a professional and personal level.  I've known Paul for over 14 years and have been lucky to work with him on two separate occasions.  Each time I've learnt, progressed and improved my understanding and appreciation of communications.  Working with Paul is not only professionally rewarding, it is also great fun.  His humour and personality always makes for an entertaining and memorable day at the office.   Clients, colleagues and media owners alike will validate that Paul is a smart operator and a great person to work with on many fronts.

Liz Farquharson

Paul is an innovative, insights led, marketer with deep knowledge of the media and communication industry. He is a rare breed - a client that’s full of ideas, highly collaborative and a joy to work with each and every time.
